content.en:
Ruins of stone towers.

Ye Tian was still cultivating, and he didn't know the thoughts of those high-level immeasurable life forms in the outside world.

At this moment, he had condensed more than 80,000 drops of immeasurable blood, and all of them had been tempered to the limit, so that every drop of immeasurable blood had reached the highest limit quality.

And his current strength is far beyond before, if he fights with the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor again, he can easily suppress the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor, and even kill him.

What's more, his Taihao Immeasurable Body is about to break through to the Dacheng Realm, and once his strength breaks through, his strength is definitely no less than that of an ordinary fourth-stage high-level Immeasurable Life Form.

You must know that in the Xuanqi Realm, the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms far surpass the powerhouses of the immeasurable blood list, and the gap between the third stage and the fourth stage is too big!

The second-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms have a record of defeating the third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, but it is almost impossible for the third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms to defeat the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and there is a record of escape.

"If it weren't for the treasures of the Ruins Stone Tower, it would really be difficult for me to raise the Taihao Immeasurable Body to the realm of close to Dacheng so quickly, even if it was the Hailou Tianjin, it would not be of great help to the Taihao Immeasurable Body. "

Soon, another period of time passed.

Finally, his Taihao Immeasurable Body was infinitely close to the Dacheng realm.

At this time, he took out a grain of golden sand, which was the benefit that the Ruins Stone Tower rewarded him with when he perfected the Immeasurable Map.

At that time, he didn't know the origin of this treasure, but after mastering the ruins stone tower, and after all these years of research, he naturally figured out the value of this treasure.

"This should be the legendary Haixi Holy Sands!"

Haixi Saint Sands This is a legendary thing, even the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the fourth stage have never seen it, because this thing has not appeared for endless years.

There is only one inside the stone tower of the ruins, which shows its preciousness.

There is definitely more to the Xuanqi Realm than this Haixi Holy Sands, but this treasure obviously contains terrifying energy, but it is not easy to find, if it does not move, its energy will be restrained until it disappears.

Therefore, even if there is a Haixi Holy Sands somewhere, it will not be detected at all.

Haixi Shengjinsha has many functions, such as enhancing the flesh and blood, improving the realm of the immeasurable body, and refining the immeasurable bones and immeasurable blood.

However, it would be too wasteful to use it to refine immeasurable bones and immeasurable blood.

Ye Tian was going to use it for him to break the shackles of Taihao's immeasurable body and advance Taihao's immeasurable body to the Dacheng realm, which was the most cost-effective.

Ye Tian swallowed the Haixi Saint Sands in one gulp, and immediately urged Taihao to refine this Haixi Saint Sands in an immeasurable manner.

Rumble!!!!!

The terrifying energy swept through Ye Tian's Taihao Infinite Body, refining it deeply, impacting the shackles in the underworld.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian's shackles were slowly torn apart.

Click!!

The shackles were broken, and Ye Tian's Taihao Infinite Body began to transform, and endless energy poured towards Ye Tian from all over the Ruins Stone Tower, helping him quickly complete the breakthrough.

It wasn't until a long time later that Ye Tian's Taihao Immeasurable Body completely stepped into the realm of Dacheng.

"Taihao Immeasurable Body has stepped into the Dacheng realm, and my strength has transformed again, and I am afraid that I can pinch and kill a top third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform like the Star Sea Great Ancestor with just one hand!"

Ye Tian said confidently.

Subsequently, he began to spend time stabilizing Taihao's immeasurable realm.

At this time, a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform from the outside world couldn't bear it anymore and was ready to make a move on the ruin stone tower.

......

In a void not too far away outside the ruin stone tower, several figures stood there, staring at the ruin stone tower.

One of them is a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, and the others are third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and they all belong to one force—Tongshan City!

Tongshan City is the controlling force of the Tongshan Domain, and its strength is no less than that of a force like the Remnant Heaven Pavilion, and it is second only to the top forces such as the Xuanqi Pavilion, Jiuyang Sea, and the Outer Alliance in the Xuanqi Territory.

There are a total of two fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms in Tongshan City, and this time it is the deputy city lord who has arrived, Junshan Great Ancestor!

"Junshan Great Ancestor, do we really want to do anything about the Ruins Stone Tower?"

Copper Mountain City's third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform Senhai Great Ancestor asked.

"Of course you have to do it!" Junshan Great Ancestor said, "If it were in the past, after a relic was refined, there would soon be a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform in charge, or many high-level immeasurable lifeforms in charge, and transform it to declare its belonging. But this time is different, the Mysterious Great Ancestor Refining Ruins Stone Tower has been doing so long, and there has been no reaction, and it is unlikely that there will be any force behind it. Other forces are afraid of their background, so they don't dare to do it, and this is our chance. If we break through the Ruined Stone Tower and occupy the treasure resources in it, we may be able to cultivate a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform for our Copper Mountain City, and we can also make my strength go further. "

Several Great Ancestors nodded again and again, without saying anything against them.

"I'm in charge of breaking through the Ruins Stone Tower, and you will block the surrounding time and space to prevent that Great Ancestor from escaping!" ordered Junshan Great Ancestor.

"Yes!"

Several Great Ancestors responded.

......

In front of the stone tower of the ruins.

The Great Ancestor of Tongshan appeared here in an instant, and several other Great Ancestors scattered around, mobilizing treasures to suppress this area.

Suddenly, some Great Ancestors knew that Tongshan City was going to make a move on the Ruined Stone Tower.

Soon, several high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the fourth stage appeared nearby, paying attention to this scene.

"Junshan Great Ancestor, this guy is going to break through the ruin stone tower, and it is expected that we will not stop it!"

Xuanxin Great Ancestor smiled slightly.

If the ruin stone tower has not been refined, then each family has a chance, and naturally they will not allow the destruction of the ruin stone tower.

After all, once the ruins stone tower is broken, it loses its value.

But now that the ruins stone tower has been completely refined by Ye Tian, it has nothing to do with them, they naturally won't stop Junshan Great Ancestor, but want to see the excitement.

If Ye Tian really has a background behind him, he will inevitably be led out.

If there is no background, the treasures in the ruins stone tower will fall into the hands of Junshan Great Ancestor and Tongshan City.

Soon.

Junshan Ancestor is about to make a move.

Rumble!!!!!

Junshan Great Ancestor performed an immeasurable extreme domain technique, slapped it with one palm, and hit the tower body of the ruins stone tower.

You must know that the ruin stone tower is extremely strong, and even the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the third stage cannot leave a mark on the tower.

But Junshan Dazu slapped it, and it directly dented, leaving a deep palm print on the tower body.

And then, the ruins stone tower trembled and shook violently.

Interior of the Ruins Stone Tower.

Ye Tian naturally sensed the situation for the first time and decided immediately.

Otherwise, if you really let Junshan Great Ancestor attack like this, it will definitely be broken.

Airplanes!!!!

The defensive armor made of the Golden God Armor protected his whole body, and then Ye Tian stepped out and faced the Junshan Great Ancestor head-on.
